channel.title: Cs.LG on 阮良斌的技术博客
channel.description: Recent content in Cs.LG on 阮良斌的技术博客

item.title: Agentic Control in Variational Language Models
item.description: 论文信息 标题: Agentic Control in Variational Language Models 作者: Yves Ruffenach 发表日期: 2026-04-14T09:47:53Z 更新: N/A arXiv ID: 2604.12513v1 PDF 链接: https://arxiv.org/pdf/2604.12513v1 分类 cs.LG 摘要 We study whether a variational language model can support a minimal and measurable form of agentic control grounded in its own internal evidence. Our model combines local variational hidden computation (EVE), a homeostatic latent regulator, structurally aware checkpoint retention and a calibrated uncertainty-aware controller operating on top of the retained model.
